rationale: ThreadLocal memory leak on web app redeploy in Tomcat; internal lifecycle/resource management, no spec rule violated.
Adding GitHub contributing guidelines file; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
fetchMaxBsonObjectSize incorrectly requires admin DB access; internal connection/auth implementation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Repeated CursorNotFound exceptions on oplog tailable cursor; operational/environmental issue, no specific spec rule violated.
Improving log message text for socket errors; cosmetic logging improvement with no spec-defined behavior.
PoolOutputBuffer not returned to pool after _checkWriteError; internal memory/performance bug, no spec rule violated.
JMX MBean change missing from a prior commit; internal monitoring API regression, no spec involvement.
Connection not closed after replica set use, process hangs; connection lifecycle bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Race condition in authenticate when _masterPortPool is null; internal threading bug, no spec rule violated.
Switch deprecated 'query'/'orderby' to '$query'/'$orderby'; wire protocol cleanup, but no published spec rule explicitly violated.
skip/limit use int instead of long; Java API type limitation, no spec-defined type requirement violated.
CursorCleanerThread not stopped on undeploy causing PermGen leak; internal thread lifecycle bug, no spec rule violated.
Reading profiling status via command('profile') disables profiling; server command misuse bug, no MongoDB driver spec involved.
Deprecate WriteConcern.setWObject to make instances immutable; API design improvement, no spec rule violated.
Constructor blocks when no server is up; unexpected blocking behavior change, internal design issue, no spec rule.
Cleaner thread stuck on auth failure causing memory leak; internal resource leak, no spec rule violated.
GMongo defaulting back to port 27017 when using ServerAddress array; internal connection setup bug, no published spec rule.
Improve server availability logging to only log state changes; logging improvement, no spec-defined behavior.
Remove Java 6 dependency (String.isEmpty()); build/compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
Cannot create full-text index on $** wildcard; driver incorrectly rejects valid index key, but no driver spec for index management covers this.
'can't find a master' error when using readPreference with commands; internal routing bug, cannot name specific violated spec rule.
NoSuchMethodError on MongoClient instantiation due to classpath conflict; classpath/version incompatibility, no spec involvement.
GridFS tries to ensureIndex on secondary causing 'not master' error; implementation bug, no gridfs spec rule about secondary reads violated.
_checkKeys skips List contents; internal key validation bug, no BSON spec rule about key validation in lists.
Semaphore limit not updated when pool options changed post-construction; internal connection pool config bug, no spec rule.
Misleading error message when object exceeds BSON size limit; error message wording improvement, no spec rule about message text.
Ignore thread affinity in connection pool after N millis for efficiency; internal pool optimization, no spec rule.
Disassociate connections from dead threads; internal connection pool management improvement, no spec rule.
Intermittent timeout exception even when data is persisted; spurious timeout on idle connection, internal networking issue.
BSONDecoder performance improvement up to 40%; pure performance optimization, no spec-defined behavior.
ObjectId.equals() not symmetric (accepts String); Java API correctness bug, no spec rule about ObjectId equality semantics.
DeepCopy of ObjectId keeps _new=true flag, causing repeated inserts instead of upserts; internal ObjectId state bug, no spec rule.
BSON package has circular dependency on MongoDB package; internal architecture/packaging issue, no spec rule.
findAndModify ignores internal class mappings set on collection; Java ORM mapping feature bug, no driver spec involvement.
ObjectId stores 3 4-byte values instead of spec-required 4+3+2+3 byte layout; explicit spec non-conformance cited in description.
Remove WriteConcern.setWObject to make immutable; API design cleanup, no spec-defined behavior involved.
Wrong comparison operator in buffer size safety check in Bits.readFully; internal I/O utility bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
ObjectId byte layout (machineID 4 bytes, counter 4 bytes) deviates from documented spec (3+2+3); explicitly stated nonconformance.
Migrate tests from TestNG to JUnit 4; test framework migration, no spec behavior involved.
QueryFailure flag in OP_REPLY defined but never checked; wire protocol spec requires respecting response flags.
isMaster.maxMessageSizeBytes not respected; DRIVERS-1 linked, wire protocol requires honoring server-advertised max message size.
Improve exception message to say 'timeout' when caused by SocketTimeoutException; error message improvement, no spec rule.
Wrong BSON size check on first use of Mongo object giving misleading exception; internal size-check bug, no specific spec rule violated.
ObjectId machine ID uses network interface names instead of MAC address; ObjectId spec requires a unique machine identifier.
Connection pool leaks connections after server restart; resource management bug, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
MongoException should include server host/port; error message enhancement, no spec-defined error format requirement.
Remove socketFactory() method from MongoClientOptions.Builder; API cleanup/removal, no spec involvement.
Binary $type in strict JSON output is a number instead of two-byte hex string; violates Extended JSON spec for Binary type encoding.
Driver doesn't re-resolve DNS on reconnect after IP change; implementation/networking behavior, no spec rule about DNS re-resolution.
Inefficient _checkKeys method iterating entry set; pure performance optimization, no spec behavior.
